name: subagent contract validator accepts the migrated-with-delta form including a reason suffix
command:
printf -- '---
name: x
model: sonnet
prompt_id: x
prompt_version: 1.0
prompt_migration_status: migrated-with-delta:fix-edge-case
---
' > agent.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/validate-contract.sh" --agent agent.md 2>out.txt && grep -q 'prompt_migration_status=migrated-with-delta' out.txt && grep -q 'delta_reason=fix-edge-case' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
